events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault for mixed old/new belts on multi-groove. In-service asset. Component condition categories: degraded, failed. Need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Mixed old/new belts on multi-groove is non-compliant and defective. It causes uneven load sharing, premature failure, vibration, heat. Decision fail. Risk high? Could be high due to belt failure, downtime, maybe not critical safety. Work_stage in-service. percent_complete maybe 100? Asset installed operating. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, degraded. Findings: mixed belt sets cause unequal stretch/load, accelerated wear, potential slippage. Actions: replace all belts as matched set per OEM, inspect sheaves alignment/tension. Rationale. References: mfr guides, maybe SMRP? Since only mfr guides on hand, use that. Need include all fields. value 0, sound_source empty? Schema says string. Could use "". event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. confidence high 0.9. Ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-service",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective",
    "non-compliant",
    "degraded"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 100,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Multi-groove drive has a mix of old and new belts installed",
    "Mixed belt sets have unequal length/settling, causing uneven load sharing across grooves",
    "Evidence indicates non-compliant maintenance practice and degraded belt drive condition",
    "Likely accelerated wear, slippage, heat, vibration, and risk of sudden belt failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down and lock out the drive before service",
    "Remove all belts and install a complete matched belt set per OEM specification",
    "Inspect sheaves for wear, groove alignment, and proper pitch diameter",
    "Set belt tension and alignment per manufacturer guide",
    "Run and verify operation, temperature, and vibration after replacement"
  ],
  "rationale": "Mixed old/new belts on a multi-groove sheave is a recognized fault condition. Belt sets must be matched in length and replaced together so each groove carries an equal share of the load. Unequal belts overload the new belts, slip in the worn grooves, generate heat and vibration, and can fail prematurely. This is non-compliant with good practice and OEM guidance, so the installation fails inspection.",
  "references": [
    "mfr guides"
  ]
}
